## Secure Exam Browser Helps in Disabling Test-Takers' Unauthorized Software, Devices And Actions

![]()

MSB-illustration

* Online Exams Are **Launched in Lockdown Mode, Using MSB Wherein Additional Software/Hardware Are Disabled**
 
* Test-Takers Are Not Allowed To **Navigate Away From The Test Window**
 
* However, Clients Can **Whitelist Applications And Software** As Required

## Just Plug and Play - It's that simple!

![]()

Download-MSB

### Download the Mettl Secure Browser Extension, and you are good to go

![]()

No-training

### No training required, no hassles involved

## The Secure Exam Browser Adds To The Suite Of Our Exam Security Tools

Our Suite Of Anti-cheating Tools (Except MSB)

![]()

3-point-candidate

### 3-point Candidate Authentication

* Email verification
 
* ID card Verification
 
* Quick authentication via OTP
 

![]()

Ai-Based-Auto-Proctoring

### AI-based Auto-proctoring

* AI-based Video proctoring, Audio proctoring, Image proctoring
 
* Flags for candidate distraction, multiple people, electronic devices, additional sounds, etc.
 
* Credibility report generated for students
 

![]()

Record-And-Review-Proctoring

### Record And Review Proctoring

* Expert human proctors review AI-based flags and credibility report
 
* Flags for suspicious activity analyzed post an exam
 
* Students questioned on suspicious activity
 

![]()

Live-proctoring

### Live Proctoring

* Expert human proctors watch one/multiple candidates live
 
* Real-time actions taken on AI-based flags
 
* The ability to chat with the test-takers, pause or end the test
